text.title: IH Build-Update Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example: indie founder posts week-14 update hitting $1k MRR; gets 31 qualified replies.

section.title: Bundle
section.code: { "title": "Week 14 — first $1k MRR, here is what flipped it", "tldr": "TL;DR: hit $1k MRR week 14 after switching from generic outreach to one-niche LinkedIn DMs. Two questions for IH on what to test next.", "body": "Background: 14 weeks solo on [PRODUCT]. Spent weeks 1-10 on generic cold outreach — 200 DMs/week, 0.5% reply, 0 sales. Week 11 I picked one niche (solo Shopify owners) and rewrote the opener. Numbers below; story under each. MRR is up because trial-to-paid finally moved; DMs sent down because I spend more time per DM now. Lesson I keep relearning: smaller niche, higher reply rate. The question is whether to double down on Shopify or pick a second niche in parallel.", "numbers": [ {"label": "MRR", "value": "$1040", "window_days": 7}, {"label": "Trial-to-paid", "value": "21%", "window_days": 7}, {"label": "DMs sent", "value": "47", "window_days": 7} ], "ask": "If you hit $1k MRR via cold outreach, what was the opener message that worked — verbatim if possible?", "scheduled_at": "2026-05-26T13:00:00Z", "weekday_et": "tue", "hour_et": 9 }

list.item: Replies: 47 total, 31 qualified (founder mode with concrete examples).
Tagged into hook-bank as "mistake-confession" pattern, SPIKED bucket.

text.example: 3 real numbers available → TL;DR ≤180 → body 800 chars → specific ask → Tue 9am ET → validator green → publish; APPROVE via run-the-checklist.
